text: Project: AgentVision X — AI Agent Observability Dashboard that visualizes the internal pipeline of a Gemini LLM query in real-time.. AgentVision X is an advanced AI observability platform that breaks down a Gemini LLM query into 7 distinct pipeline stages — parsing, retrieval, reasoning, generation, validation, and more — and streams the progress to the frontend over WebSockets. It provides deep transparency into how AI agents process and respond to queries, with per-step latency tracking, token cost analysis, and an interactive execution graph. Tech stack: React, FastAPI, Python, WebSockets, Gemini API. Year: 2026. Status: completed. Key features: 7-stage LLM pipeline visualization (parsing, retrieval, reasoning, generation, validation); Real-time WebSocket streaming of pipeline progress; Per-step latency tracking; Prompt, completion, and thinking token tracking; Cost estimation per query; Animated execution graph; Timeline scrubber to replay past runs; Step inspector for inputs and outputs; Failure injection mode to re-run individual steps. Category: AI / Observability.

Project: Anvesync — Full-stack workforce management platform with employee records, attendance tracking, leave management, and admin analytics.. Anvesync is a production-grade HR and workforce management platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. It supports multiple roles (admin, manager, employee) with role-based access control backed by Prisma and a relational database. Features include location-aware check-in/check-out attendance, leave request workflows, employee record management, and rich admin analytics dashboards. Tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL. Year: 2026. Status: completed. Key features: Employee record management; Location-aware check-in/check-out attendance; Leave request and approval workflows; Admin analytics dashboard; Role-based access control (admin, manager, employee); Reusable UI components for tables, filters, and charts; Next.js API routes for auth, attendance, leaves, and reporting. Category: Full-Stack / HR Platform.

Project: Xrepo — Open-source collaborative platform for developing, sharing, and iterating on quantum algorithms. FOSS Hackathon Winner.. Xrepo is a web-based quantum circuit playground and collaborative repository built for the FOSS Hackathon, where it won 1st place out of 50+ teams. It provides a visual quantum circuit designer with real-time multi-user collaboration, a versioned repository system tailored to quantum circuits, and an integrated Gemini-powered learning assistant and documentation generator. Tech stack: React, Node.js, MongoDB, Firebase, Gemini API. Year: 2025. Status: completed. Key features: Web-based quantum circuit designer; Real-time multi-user collaboration; Versioned repository for quantum circuits; Gemini API-powered documentation generation; In-app learning assistant for quantum computing; Open-source architecture. Category: Open Source / Quantum Computing. GitHub: https://github.com/harshraj677/Xrepo

Project: GateCraft — Interactive playground for learning and experimenting with digital logic gates. Select a gate, toggle inputs, and see the output in real time.. GateCraft is an educational web application that provides an interactive environment for learning digital logic gates. Users can select any logic gate (AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR), toggle inputs, and instantly see the output. It integrates Gemini 2.5 AI to explain gate behavior and logic concepts in an accessible way. Tech stack: React.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Gemini 2.5 AI. Year: 2025. Status: live. Key features: Interactive logic gate selection (AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR); Real-time input toggling and output visualization; AI-powered explanations via Gemini 2.5; Educational content for each gate type; Responsive design with Tailwind CSS. Category: Education / Frontend. GitHub: https://github.com/harshraj677/Gatecraft.git | Live demo: https://gatecraft.netlify.app/

Project: PDF Designer — The ultimate free online PDF tool for all your needs — create, edit, and export PDF documents from the browser.. PDF Designer is a browser-based PDF creation and editing tool that allows users to design professional PDF documents without any software installation. It features a rich text editor, template management, and multiple export options, all built with vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Tech stack: JavaScript, HTML, CSS. Year: 2024. Status: live. Key features: PDF creation from scratch; Template management; Export options; Rich text editor; Browser-based, no installation required. Category: Productivity / Frontend. GitHub: https://github.com/harshraj677/PDFDesigner.git | Live demo: https://pdfdesigner.blogspot.com/?m=1

Project: Harx Portfolio — Personal portfolio website showcasing projects, achievements, and technical skills, built with React and Tailwind CSS.. It showcases projects, experience, achievements, skills, and a contact form with email delivery integration. Tech stack: React.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, EmailJS, Framer Motion, Vite. Year: 2024.
